classified_questions.question: Can you describe in your own words what the problem is asking us to find?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many points are on the grid? How many lines can we draw using two of these points?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Are there any lines that don't pass through at least two points on the grid? If so, how many are there?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many lines pass through just two points on the grid? How do we count these lines?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many lines pass through exactly three points on the grid? How do we count these lines?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Why do we have to subtract twice the number of lines that go through three points in order to get the correct answer?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can we apply the same approach to find the number of lines that pass through at least two points on a larger grid? How would the calculations change?
classified_questions.label: b
